About Our Restaurants

Tasty bites is a familly restaurants where delicious meals meet happiness.
we prepare fresh food everyday using natural ingridents.
our goal is to give costumer the best tate and comfort.

Our Popular Meal

1.jollof rice & chicken

our party jollof rice is cooked with rice tomato sauce and served with spicy griled chicken

2. burger & fries

soft bread ,fresh beef , vegetable and cheese makes our burger special. served with crispy golden fries.

3. Ice cream

cool down your day with our creamy vanilla and chocolate ice creame.
